The Journey Within

Every bloom on this stem is a life she stepped into fully — before growing toward the next.

Lawyer
Trained in the discipline of argument and evidence — the analytical foundation for everything that followed.
Certified Life Coach
Learned to hold space for other people's turning points, and to ask the questions that unlock them.
Reiki Grandmaster
Deepened into energy healing as a practice of presence — a way of listening beyond words.
Author

Today she guides women through stress, burnout and self-doubt — gently, and one conversation at a time.
"

Meet Sweta

Sweta Gaitonde is a lawyer, certified life coach, Reiki Grandmaster, energy healer, author, and mental wellness facilitator who loves helping women embrace self-love and holistic healing.

She has written two well-received books — one became an Amazon Bestseller, and the other was recognised by the Asia Book of Records. By combining coaching, healing, meditation, and Mandala Art, she supports women in dealing with stress, anxiety, self-doubt, and other emotional challenges.

Her Mandala Healing Programs bring together mindful art, breathwork, meditation, and self-reflection to help improve mental and emotional wellbeing. Through her workshops and sessions, Sweta has helped many women find more inner peace, build resilience, and grow in confidence.

Philosophy

Seven petals. Seven practices. One woman learning to open, at her own pace.

Healing

The starting petal. Every path here begins with permission — to feel what hurts, and to trust that it can soften.

Meditation

Love doesn't end on the 14th — it begins with you

Embrace Your Mental Health

De-stress and balance your hormones with Mandala Art & Meditation.

Limited seats

Embrace Your Mental Health with Mandala Art

A unique holistic program designed to help women reduce stress, calm their minds, and reconnect with themselves through the healing power of Mandala Art.

In this program, you will:

  • 🌸 Reduce stress and anxiety naturally
  • 🧠 Improve focus and mental clarity
  • 💖 Build emotional resilience and self-worth
  • 🌿 Experience deep relaxation through meditation and pranayama
  • ✨ Restore inner peace and emotional balance
  • 🤝 Connect with a supportive community of women

No artistic experience is needed—just an open heart and a willingness to heal.

Because when your mind is at peace, every area of your life begins to flourish.

Monthly healing membership for women

Moonlight Healing Circle

Heal your mind. Rest your heart. Sleep in peace.

Mon–Thurs · 9:15–9:45 PM

Good mornings start the night before

Join us every Monday to Thursday for a calming evening ritual of healing, connection, and peaceful sleep — a simple night-time routine that helps you relax, sleep better, and wake up feeling energized.

What you'll experience:

  • 🌙 Release the stress and emotional baggage of the day
  • 💜 Calm an overactive mind and restore inner peace
  • 🌿 Build healthy night-time rituals for deeper, more restful sleep
  • 🤍 Experience gentle healing practices to support emotional well-being
  • 🥲 Be part of a safe, supportive sisterhood where you can share, speak openly, and be heard without judgment
  • ✨ Feel lighter, stronger, and emotionally balanced as we heal and grow together

Because every woman deserves a space where she feels safe, seen, heard, and supported.

You deserve this time for you.
